title: AK-Jeevan/production-rag-system
summary: AK-Jeevan/production-rag-system 是一个专为可扩展性、模块化和实际部署而构建的生产就绪检索增强生成 (RAG) 系统。该系统集成了高效的文档摄取、向量搜索、缓存和监控，以在企业工作流程中提供可靠、低延迟的AI响应。，基于模型推理的架构
description: Production‑ready Retrieval‑Augmented Generation (RAG) system built for scalability, modularity, and real‑world deployment. Integrates efficient document ingestion, vector search, caching, and monitoring to deliver reliable, low‑latency AI responses in enterprise workflows.
